# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data

Parameters:
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - m5.large
      - m5.xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type
  
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: EC2 Key Pair for SSH access
  
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI
  
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC ID where instances will be launched
  
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet ID for instance placement
  
  EbsVolumeSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 10
    MaxValue: 16384
    Description: Size of EBS volume in GB
  
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of EC2 instances to create

Conditions:
  CreateInstance1: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 1]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  
  CreateInstance2: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 2]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]
  
  CreateInstance3: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 7]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 8]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 9]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 10]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstanceSecurityGroup

  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstanceRole

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole

  AppInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance1
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstance1

  DataVolume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateInstance1
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref EbsVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationDataVolume1

  VolumeAttachment1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateInstance1
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance1
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume1

  AppInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstance2

  DataVolume2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref EbsVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationDataVolume2

  VolumeAttachment2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance2
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume2

  AppInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationInstance3

  DataVolume3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt AppInstance3.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref EbsVolumeSize
      VolumeType: gp3
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ApplicationDataVolume3

  VolumeAttachment3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Properties:
      Device: /dev/sdf
      InstanceId: !Ref AppInstance3
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume3

Outputs:
  Instance1Id:
    Condition: CreateInstance1
    Value: !Ref AppInstance1
    Description: Instance 1 ID
  
  Instance1PublicIp:
    Condition: CreateInstance1
    Value: !GetAtt AppInstance1.PublicIp
    Description: Instance 1 Public IP
  
  Instance2Id:
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Value: !Ref AppInstance2
    Description: Instance 2 ID
  
  Instance2PublicIp:
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Value: !GetAtt AppInstance2.PublicIp
    Description: Instance 2 Public IP
  
  Instance3Id:
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Value: !Ref AppInstance3
    Description: Instance 3 ID
  
  Instance3PublicIp:
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Value: !GetAtt AppInstance3.PublicIp
    Description: Instance 3 Public IP
  
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
    Description: Security Group ID
